cn_title: Bungie感谢玩家并首次公开《命运2》「胜利纪念碑」更新内容
subtitle: 谢幕演出
opus_summary: Bungie向《命运2》社区致谢，并首次详细展示了6月9日发布的「胜利纪念碑」更新内容。尽管这将是《命运2》最后一次重大内容更新，但大量玩家期待已久的改动令社区情绪高涨，Reddit上有玩家称其为「多年来最佳单次更新」。更新包括自动步枪射速从360提升至400 RPM、七件回归神器、所有异域武器获得催化剂等。与此同时，要求索尼批准开发《命运3》的请愿已超30万人签名。

paragraphs.en: Monument of Triumph will be Bungie's last major content update for Destiny 2, but that isn't stopping the studio from launching what some fans think will be its "best singular update in years."
paragraphs.cn: 「胜利纪念碑」将是Bungie为《命运2》推出的最后一次重大内容更新，但这并没有阻止工作室推出一次被部分玩家认为是「多年来最佳单次更新」的版本。

paragraphs.en: The studio outlined the biggest changes for weapons, artifacts, and more in the upcoming update ahead of its June 9 release date in a Dev Insights blog post today. It followed an additional, well-received Dev Insights article published yesterday, which also confirmed a smorgasbord of other changes set to come to the game just as players prepare for the beginning of the end.
paragraphs.cn: 工作室今天在一篇开发者洞察博文中详细介绍了即将于6月9日发布的更新中关于武器、神器等方面的重大变化。此前一天发布的另一篇开发者洞察文章也广受好评，确认了大量其他改动——正值玩家们准备迎接《命运2》的终章。

paragraphs.en: Before digging into one of the biggest updates players have received in years, Bungie opened its post with a message to the fans who have shown up for the team since it announced plans to discontinue support for Destiny 2 last week. It's a bittersweet letter to those who have played Destiny since its original launch in 2014, and a thank you to the players ready to jump into Monument of Triumph.
paragraphs.cn: 在深入介绍这次多年来最大规模的更新之前，Bungie在文章开头向那些自上周宣布停止《命运2》支持以来一直陪伴团队的粉丝们致辞。这是一封苦乐参半的信，写给自2014年初代《命运》发售以来一路相伴的玩家，也是对即将投入「胜利纪念碑」的玩家们的感谢。

paragraphs.en: "Every memory and every moment you've shared with us over the years has fueled our future," Bungie said. "Every ounce of our June update is for you, and we hope you feel it as you continue to read through our insight articles and upcoming This Week in Destiny articles, let alone when you're playing the update with us on June 9."
paragraphs.cn: 「你们这些年与我们分享的每一段记忆、每一个瞬间，都在推动着我们的未来，」Bungie写道。「我们六月更新的每一分心血都是为了你们，我们希望你们在阅读我们的洞察文章和即将推出的《本周命运》文章时能感受到这一点——更不用说6月9日和我们一起进入游戏的时候了。」

paragraphs.en: Come June 9, players can expect a host of changes ranging from small to large as Bungie aims to tackle what have been some of the most-requested tweaks. These include an increase from 360 to 400 RPM for auto rifles, seven returning Artifacts, and, as confirmed by Bungie principal comms manager Dylan 'dmg04' Gafner, Catalysts for every Exotic weapon.
paragraphs.cn: 6月9日到来时，玩家可以期待从小到大的一系列改动，Bungie旨在解决那些呼声最高的调整需求。其中包括自动步枪射速从360提升至400 RPM、七件回归神器，以及Bungie首席社区经理Dylan「dmg04」Gafner确认的——为每一把异域武器配备催化剂。

paragraphs.en: All of these changes and more will drop with Monument of Triumph in June, but players have already made a judgement call. Weeks before the final major patch for Destiny 2, players are calling this one of the best updates the game has received since the sequel originally launched in 2017.
paragraphs.cn: 所有这些改动及更多内容将随「胜利纪念碑」在六月上线，但玩家们已经提前下了定论。在《命运2》最终重大补丁发布前数周，玩家们就已称其为自2017年续作发售以来最好的更新之一。

paragraphs.en: "They're actually giving us everything we could want. Oh my god bruh," one Reddit user reacted. "This is going to be the best singular update in years," another said. "The devs were finally able to put on their chef hat and really cook after all this time."
paragraphs.cn: 「他们真的给了我们想要的一切。天哪老兄，」一位Reddit用户感叹道。「这将是多年来最好的单次更新，」另一位说。「开发者们终于能戴上厨师帽大展身手了。」

paragraphs.en: "Hard to shake the 'YOU COULD HAVE DONE THIS THE WHOLE TIME???' feeling of every piece of news with this update but I'm not going to complain, community sentiment being at recent highs with this update is the only chance in hell we have of getting a D3," another fan said.
paragraphs.cn: 「每看到这次更新的一条消息都很难摆脱『你们一直都能做到却不做？？？』的感觉，但我不打算抱怨——社区情绪因为这次更新达到近期高点，这是我们获得《命运3》的唯一希望，」另一位粉丝说。

paragraphs.en: For now, it looks like Monument of Triumph will help Destiny 2 go out with a bang instead of giving it a second wind, but that isn't stopping players from trying to breathe new life into Bungie's sci-fi shooter franchise. A number of fan initiatives have emerged in the wake of the announcement, including a popular petition which has reached more than 300,000 signatures, as well as a community-driven server slam.
paragraphs.cn: 目前看来，「胜利纪念碑」将帮助《命运2》以一声巨响谢幕，而非获得第二春——但这并没有阻止玩家们试图为Bungie的科幻射击游戏系列注入新生命。自停服公告以来出现了多项粉丝自发行动，包括一份已超过30万人签名的请愿书，以及一次社区组织的服务器冲击活动。

paragraphs.en: Bungie warned that next month's long-in-development update would focus on quality-of-life improvements back in February, but how long the changes detailed today have been in the cards is unclear. For now, a Bloomberg report has stated that Destiny 3 is not in active development.
paragraphs.cn: Bungie早在二月就预告下月这个筹备已久的更新将聚焦生活质量改善，但今天公布的这些具体改动酝酿了多久尚不清楚。目前，Bloomberg报道称《命运3》并未处于积极开发中。
